name: SpacetimeDB Repository Mapper Boundary
summary: Centralize SpacetimeDB table access in repositories and row/domain shape conversion in mappers.

items: Rows are dumb SpacetimeDB storage records with table attributes, indexes, and public fields.
Mappers are the only code that knows both row shapes and domain aggregate shapes.
Repositories are the only code that knows table accessors, surrogate row ids, scoped uniqueness guards, and save/delete ordering.
Reducers and views call repository functions instead of scattering `ctx.db` access for aggregate state.
